question: Which income level segment has the largest share in the final year shown?

options.A: Cannot determine which income level has the largest share without a legend explaining what each color represents.
options.B: The orange segment (low income) has the largest share.
options.C: The purple segment (middle income) has the largest share.
options.D: The red segment (high income) has the largest share.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
